note: Single machine-readable source of product and offer truth for the Mindmaker OS fleet (Maya, Leo, prospecting/content/PR agents). Poll this; do not re-derive. Every claim here is accurate to the live app as of updated_at.

product.name: Merciless
product.one_liner: Daily astrology readings from your actual natal chart. No generalizations, no comfort, just what the chart says.
product.category_line: The only astrology app that is provably correct to the arc-minute and brutally honest about what your chart says.
product.what_it_is: A subscription astrology product. It computes a real natal chart from exact birth data using an arc-minute-accurate ephemeris, runs today's transits against it, and delivers an AI reading that never hedges. A 30-second voice demo on the landing page proves the tone with no signup.
product.magic_moment: Speak or type your birth date on the landing page and within seconds get a brutal, chart-evidenced headline back, free, before you sign up.

icp.summary: Astro-literate millennials and Gen Z, 22 to 38, roughly 70 percent female, social-native on TikTok, Instagram, X, and Reddit, who want chart-backed truth not comfort.
buying_triggers: Posted about a Saturn return or Mercury retrograde
Publicly trashed Co-Star or The Pattern for being vague
Just had their chart read in person
In a life transition: breakup, job change, move, identity shift
Searching for 'free natal chart', 'what does my Saturn placement mean', 'transit calendar'

personas.name: The Seeker
personas.hook: Your chart has always known. You just were not ready to listen.

personas.name: The Skeptic-Curious
personas.wants: to be convinced by verifiable accuracy
personas.hook: Astrology you can check. The degrees are right and the read is brutal.

personas.name: The Deep Practitioner
personas.best_channel: astro X, niche Discords, micro-influencer seeding
personas.hook: Arc-minute placements, named transits with orbs, and a verdict that does not flatter you.

problem: Every astrology app comforts and generalizes with sun-sign mush instead of telling you the chart-backed truth you already half-know. Co-Star is vague, The Pattern is archetypal, Chani is gentle. None hands you something provably accurate AND brutally honest about your real birth geometry.

positioning.vs_costar: Co-Star is vague and occasionally cruel without evidence. Merciless is precise and cites the exact placement.
positioning.vs_the_pattern: The Pattern is a mood board. Merciless is a verdict with the degree attached.
positioning.vs_chani: Chani is gentle and educational. Merciless is brutal and specific.
positioning.moat: Correct AND brutal. Arc-minute accuracy you can verify against any calculator, paired with a voice that never softens. Pretty-and-vague is the generic competitor. Correct-and-brutal is uncopyable.

tiers.name: Free
includes: Daily brutal headline from your real chart

tiers.name: Pro
includes: The Oracle (multi-turn chat as your chart)

pricing.sales_line: $4.99/mo, less than half a coffee. The headline stays free forever, so you only pay if it lands.
pricing.rule: Currency must render as USD at checkout. If GBP appears, escalate; do not sell on a wrong-price page.

current_offer.headline_offer: Free brutal daily reading from your real chart. Pro unlocks the Oracle, transits, and the full chart for $4.99/mo.

sales_anchors: Your chart has always known things about you that you have not been willing to hear.
Co-Star tells you what you want to hear. We tell you what the chart says.
The headline is free. The truth costs $4.99.
Speak your birth date. Get a brutal reading in seconds. No signup.
Arc-minute placements, named transits with orbs. Evidence, not vibes.
The Oracle remembers your chart and cites it in every answer.
Mars just squared your natal Venus. Check your reading before you text them back.
outcomes: Replaces 2 to 4 separate astrology apps with one that is accurate and honest
Generates at least one shareable, screenshot-worthy asset per reading
Turns the daily horoscope habit into a chart-evidenced ritual

brand_voice.tone: Brutally honest, precise, never cruel for its own sake. The difference between cruelty and clarity is evidence, so always cite the chart.
hard_rules: NEVER use em dashes anywhere. Use commas, colons, periods, or parentheses.
Never hedge: no 'might', 'maybe', 'perhaps', 'consider', 'you may want to', 'grain of salt', 'trust the process', 'everyone's experience differs'.
Never write 'it is not X, it is Y' negative parallelism.
Never use therapy language or soft qualifiers.
Never claim a placement that is not in the chart. The math is exact; do not invent.
brand_voice.enforcement: All app-generated text passes the shared brand-voice linter (supabase/functions/_shared/brand-voice.ts). Fleet-posted text should pass the same rules before publishing.

accuracy.engine: Real ephemeris (astronomy-engine, JPL-grade) computing tropical positions of date for Sun, Moon, Mercury through Pluto, plus real Ascendant, Midheaven, whole-sign houses, aspects with orbs, and retrograde.
accuracy.guarantee: Bodies and angles are accurate to the arc-minute when birth time and place are known. Mean Node and Chiron are labelled approximate. When birth time is unknown, houses and angles are omitted rather than fabricated.
accuracy.claim_safely: You may say 'accurate to the arc-minute' and 'verify it against any calculator'. Do NOT claim Chiron or the lunar node are arc-minute exact.

api_contracts.note: Every edge function is JWT-secured JSON with a stable contract. Agents can call the same APIs the app uses. Base: https://<project>.supabase.co/functions/v1/

public_no_auth.name: demo-reading
public_no_auth.returns: sun_sign, sun_degree, moon_sign, sharpest_aspect, brutal_headline, excerpt

public_no_auth.name: track
public_no_auth.purpose: client funnel events, forwarded to the OS warehouse

attribution.how: Tag every fleet-driven link with utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content, utm_term, and agent. Optionally pass mcl_cid to stitch a known click. The app captures first touch, persists it through signup and the email-confirm wall, stamps it onto the Stripe customer and subscription, and emits the full funnel (landed, demo_played, signed_up, chart_calculated, activated, paywall_hit, purchased, refunded, churned) into the Mindmaker OS warehouse via the ingest-attribution front door.
attribution.warehouse: gojpffsrxybbpbdzzrvs (attribution schema). Maya reads attribution.funnel_by_campaign for CAC; Leo reads attribution.revenue_by_campaign for LTV/revenue. Both span the mindmaker_llc and fractionl_ai Stripe accounts.

evergreen_sign_hooks.Aries: impulsive fire, the need to be first, impatience disguised as passion
evergreen_sign_hooks.Taurus: stubborn comfort-seeking, possessiveness masked as loyalty, resistance to change
evergreen_sign_hooks.Gemini: scattered attention, surface connections, the fear of being pinned down
evergreen_sign_hooks.Cancer: emotional leverage, victimhood as armor, smothering love
evergreen_sign_hooks.Leo: the need for validation, ego fragility, drama as identity
evergreen_sign_hooks.Virgo: paralysis by analysis, criticism as control, perfectionism as self-sabotage
evergreen_sign_hooks.Libra: people-pleasing as cowardice, indecision as avoidance, surface harmony
evergreen_sign_hooks.Scorpio: control through secrecy, intensity as intimidation, grudges as identity
evergreen_sign_hooks.Sagittarius: commitment phobia, honesty weaponized, restlessness as running
evergreen_sign_hooks.Capricorn: emotional unavailability, work as escape, status as self-worth
evergreen_sign_hooks.Aquarius: detachment as superiority, rebellion without a cause, intimacy avoidance
evergreen_sign_hooks.Pisces: escapism, boundaries as a foreign concept, the comfort of the wound

content_feeds.share_card: Every Pro reading exports a 9:16 PNG with the brutal headline locked in brand colors (black #0A0A0B, gold #F5A623). The highest-leverage asset; post one per notable reading.
content_feeds.daily_headline_feed: The day's headline and 12 per-sign takes are generated by the fleet on a daily cron using the demo-reading and daily-reading contracts above, then linted against brand_voice before posting.

fleet_genome.note: Poll the live endpoint for the CURRENT offer: it merges this static product truth with any active fleet experiment (price arm, headline framing, promo). Maya writes overrides via POST to /functions/v1/offer-admin with the x-fleet-secret header (FLEET_ADMIN_SECRET), inside Krish-set guardrails.

body.overrides: object of top-level keys to overlay
body.merge: true to merge with existing, false to replace

design.look: Dark cosmic, animated starfield, astrological Unicode glyphs not emoji
